article_title: Insulet Recalls Omnipod 5 Insulin Pods After 18 Serious Adverse Events Linked to Internal Tubing Defect

content_preview.title: Insulet Recalls Omnipod 5 Insulin Pods After 18 Serious Adverse Events Linked to Internal Tubing Defect
content_preview.summary: Insulet has initiated a voluntary recall of certain Omnipod 5 insulin pump pods after a manufacturing defect caused insulin to leak inside the device rather than reaching patients, leading to 18 serious adverse events including hospitalizations for diabetic ketoacidosis.
content_preview.body_excerpt:
## Overview

Insulet Corporation has initiated a voluntary medical device correction for certain lots of its Omnipod 5 automated insulin delivery pods distributed in the United States, after identifying a manufacturing defect that can cause insulin to leak inside the device rather than being delivered to the patient. The company disclosed that the FDA has received 18 reports of serious adverse events, including hospitalizations for diabetic ketoacidosis, though no deaths have been reported, acco...

editor_notes.source_verification: FDA recall notice confirms all key claims: 18 serious adverse events, internal tubing tears causing insulin leakage, DKA hospitalizations, no deaths, 1.5% of annual global production affected, omnipod.com/check-pods verification tool, 24/7 support line.
editor_notes.factual_accuracy: All key claims verified against primary FDA source: defect description, adverse event count, DKA risk, replacement process. No discrepancies found.
editor_notes.tone_assessment: Appropriately serious medical device reporting. Includes patient safety information without alarmism. The 'What We Don't Know' section properly flags manufacturing timeline questions.
editor_notes.originality: Solid medical device recall coverage with appropriate context about insulin pump market and patient impact.
editor_notes.overall_assessment: Well-sourced medical device news at 759 words. Primary FDA source provides strong verification. Patient safety information appropriately included.
